mnemonics.title: IoT Topology Pipeline - SPVDAAS
mnemonics.content:
Remember 7 stages with 'SPVDAAS':

S - Spout (ingest)
P - Parse (extract)
V - Validate (check)
D - Detect (anomaly)
A - Aggregate (window)
A - Alert (notify)
S - Store (persist)

Think: 'SPeeD VAlue Added to Streaming'

mnemonics.title: Window Types - TSS
mnemonics.content:
Remember 3 window types with 'TSS':

T - Tumbling (non-overlapping)
S - Sliding (overlapping)
S - Session (activity-based)

Think: 'Time Sliding Session'
